title: Baktoid (disambiguation)
content:
'''Baktoid''' may refer to the following:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Baktoid Armor Workshop]]''', a weapon, vehicle and [[droid]] manufacturer owned by the [[Techno Union]] which supplied the [[Trade Federation]] during the [[Invasion of Naboo|Invasion of]] [[Naboo]]
*'''[[Baktoid Combat Automata]]''', the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]]' [[battle droid]] manufacturer derivative of Baktoid Armor Workshop
*'''[[Baktoid Fleet Ordnance]]''', the [[HMP droid gunship]]'s manufacturer
*'''[[Baktoid Industrial Systems]]''', the successor of Baktoid Industries
*'''[[Baktoid Industries]]''', a company active in [[the galaxy]]
*'''[[Baktoid Innovations]]''', the [[S/D Decimator droid]]'s manufacturer

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Baktoid Armor Workshop/Legends|Baktoid Armor Workshop]]''', the public manufacturer subsidiary to [[Baktoid Industries/Legends|Baktoid Industries]]
*'''[[Baktoid Combat Automata/Legends|Baktoid Combat Automata]]''', the [[Judicial Department/Legends|illicit]] manufacturer subsidiary to Baktoid Industries
*'''[[Baktoid Fleet Ordnance/Legends|Baktoid Fleet Ordnance]]''', the [[Droid/Legends|droid]]-equipped [[Warship/Legends|warship]] manufacturer subsidiary to Baktoid Combat Automata
*'''[[Baktoid Industrial Systems/Legends|Baktoid Industrial Systems]]''', the successor of Baktoid Industries
*'''[[Baktoid Industries/Legends|Baktoid Industries]]''', a holdings corporation under the [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]]

{{Disambig}}
